Source   Edit  

Diplomatic Event Intelligence Reporting

Generates intelligence reports for diplomatic events All houses receive intelligence about major diplomatic shifts

Imports

types, ../gamestate, ../diplomacy/types

Procs

proc generateAllianceFormedIntel(state: var GameState; house1: HouseId;
                                 house2: HouseId; turn: int) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generate intelligence reports when alliance is formed All houses receive this intelligence (public event) Source   Edit   
proc generateDiplomaticBreakIntel(state: var GameState; house1: HouseId;
                                  house2: HouseId; relationshipType: string;
                                  turn: int) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Generate intelligence reports when diplomatic relationship is broken All houses receive this intelligence (public event) Source   Edit   
proc generatePactFormedIntel(state: var GameState; house1: HouseId;
                             house2: HouseId; pactType: string; turn: int) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generate intelligence reports when pact is formed All houses receive this intelligence (public event) Source   Edit   
proc generatePeaceTreatyIntel(state: var GameState; house1: HouseId;
                              house2: HouseId; turn: int) {....raises: [KeyError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generate intelligence reports when peace treaty is signed All houses receive this intelligence (public event) Source   Edit   
proc generateWarDeclarationIntel(state: var GameState; declaringHouse: HouseId;
                                 targetHouse: HouseId; turn: int) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generate intelligence reports when war is declared All houses receive this intelligence (public event) Source   Edit
